positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a futuristic cityscape merging with tropical flora. The scene features massive, glowing bio-luminescent jungle vines entwining chrome skyscrapers and floating, geometric island platforms. Key elements include a graceful, winged mechanical creature soaring through the heart of the metropolis, vibrant sapphire blue and emerald green dominant colors contrasted against deep charcoal gray and metallic silver. The composition should be highly detailed, suitable for screen printing, with bold silhouettes and clean lines, rendered in a pop-art tattoo style, high contrast, volumetric lighting, central composition, art deco influence.
